videos.title: OpenClaw 4.23 + GPT-5.5 AI Just Changed Everything
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenClaw 4.23 + GPT-5.5 AI Just Changed Everything Want to make money and save time with AI? Join here: https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Video notes + links to the tools 👉 https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Get a FREE AI SEO Strategy Session → https://go.juliangoldie.com/strategy-session?utm=julian

OpenClaw 4.23 Update: GPT 5.5, Built‑In Image Generation, Smarter Subagents + Messaging Fixes

OpenClaw 4.23 introduces GPT 5.5 built in, automatically cleaning older model entries and making the new model available immediately via OpenAI or Codex. Image generation and editing are now easier: agents can create images without an extra API key when logged into Codex, OpenRouter now supports image generation, and agents can request specifics like quality, transparent backgrounds, file formats, and compression; multi-reference image edits that were previously broken are fixed. Multi-agent workflows improve with optional context sharing so subagents can see the main agent’s prior conversation, and tasks can set custom timeouts. Messaging and browser fixes include proper image display in Telegram groups, hiding internal traces in Slack, more consistent WhatsApp media handling, clearer browser error messages and model-capacity suggestions, and generated images persisting in chat history. Additional updates cover resource controls for local search, dreaming no longer requiring heartbeat, security hardening across platforms, and smoother plugin installs.

Will Jacob Rodriguez or Eli Stowers fall to the Denver Broncos on Day 2 of the NFL Draft Day 2 of the 2026 NFL Draft is here! And this time, the Denver Broncos get to make a pick!

The NFL will conduct the second and third rounds of the NFL Draft today. The Denver Broncos have a pick in the second round, No. 62 overall. Will Sean Payton add a weapon for Bo Nix and the offense, like Eli Stowers or Jonah Coleman? Would a defender like Jacob Rodriguez make more sense?

videos.title: Don’t Make This Backswing Mistake #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Don’t Make This Backswing Mistake #golfswing #golftips One of the most common backswing faults we see is the disconnected moveaway — when the arms push away from the body and lose sync early.
Once the arms separate, the swing loses structure, leading to poor contact and compensations later.
Visualize a line in front of your hands and feel them trace under that line to stay connected and synced with your body.
It’s a small start-of-swing fix that makes the entire motion smoother and impact more consistent.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026 Check out all the best shots from Round 2 foursomes at the 2026 Zurich Classic of New Orleans, featuring Matt and Alex Fitzpatrick, Tony Finau, Wyndham Clark and Ben Griffin, among others.

It’s once again time to team up at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans, the PGA TOUR’s only team event, held at TPC Louisiana. Now in its ninth year as a pairs format, the event mixes Four-ball and Foursomes across four days, delivering a unique test and plenty of volatility as duos battle for momentum and FedExCup points with the Cadillac Championship on the horizon. Fresh off his playoff win at the RBC Heritage, Matt Fitzpatrick teams up with brother Alex Fitzpatrick, forming one of the most in-form pairings in the field.  A major storyline sees Brooks Koepka return to the event alongside past champion Shane Lowry who won in 2024 with back-to-back Masters champion Rory McIlroy, while defending champions Ben Griffin and Andrew Novak look to make history as the first team to go back-to-back. Rising stars are also well represented, with Michael Brennan and Johnny Keefer making their debuts, while Blades Brown pairs with Luke Clanton as part of the next wave of talent. International pairings add further intrigue, including Tom Kim with Kevin Yu, and the South African duo of Erik van Rooyen and Christiaan Bezuidenhout. With no other event like it on TOUR, the Zurich Classic blends chemistry, strategy and shot making and with major qualification pathways and Signature Event spots in play, there’s plenty on the line in New Orleans.

videos.title: How to Tape a Hockey Stick
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Tape a Hockey Stick You just bought your first hockey stick, and you're about to head out for your first time on the ice—you want to show up ready. One of the simplest ways to prepare is learning how to properly tape your hockey stick. Taping the handle improves grip and comfort since your top hand acts as the steering wheel for stickhandling and control. Taping the blade serves a different purpose, helping improve puck feel, control, and shot accuracy while also protecting the blade from wear.

While every individual will develop their own style and routine, this video breaks the process down into a few easy steps so you can quickly learn how to tape both the handle and blade of your stick. We'll also cover helpful tips like tape color, wax, and alternative grip options so you can find the setup that feels best for your game.

videos.title: Playoff Goaltending Breakdown So Far | Real Kyper & Bourne
videos.summary_source_text:
Playoff Goaltending Breakdown So Far | Real Kyper & Bourne Nick Kypreos, Justin Bourne, and fill-in producer Daniele Franceschi check in on the Toronto Maple Leafs' search for a director of hockey operations. Next, TVA analyst and former NHLer Pascal Leclaire helps tee up Game 3 between the Montreal Canadiens and Tampa Bay Lightning. Then, Hockey Hall of Famer and TNT analyst Henrik Lundqvist joins to weigh in on the postseason goaltending so far. Later, former NHL president, GM, & head coach Doug MacLean comes on to chat about the rumours surrounding the next GM with the Leafs and Vancouver Canucks.

videos.title: Fitzpatrick brothers FIRE alternate-shot 65 | Round 2 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Fitzpatrick brothers FIRE alternate-shot 65 | Round 2 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026 In the second round of the 2026 Zurich Classic of New Orleans, Matt and Alex Fitzpatrick shoot a 7-under 65 in Friday foursomes to get to 15-under par, positioning them at T2 heading into the weekend at TPC Louisiana.

It’s once again time to team up at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans, the PGA TOUR’s only team event, held at TPC Louisiana. Now in its ninth year as a pairs format, the event mixes Four-ball and Foursomes across four days, delivering a unique test and plenty of volatility as duos battle for momentum and FedExCup points with the Cadillac Championship on the horizon. Fresh off his playoff win at the RBC Heritage, Matt Fitzpatrick teams up with brother Alex Fitzpatrick, forming one of the most in-form pairings in the field.  A major storyline sees Brooks Koepka return to the event alongside past champion Shane Lowry who won in 2024 with back-to-back Masters champion Rory McIlroy, while defending champions Ben Griffin and Andrew Novak look to make history as the first team to go back-to-back. Rising stars are also well represented, with Michael Brennan and Johnny Keefer making their debuts, while Blades Brown pairs with Luke Clanton as part of the next wave of talent. International pairings add further intrigue, including Tom Kim with Kevin Yu, and the South African duo of Erik van Rooyen and Christiaan Bezuidenhout. With no other event like it on TOUR, the Zurich Classic blends chemistry, strategy and shot making and with major qualification pathways and Signature Event spots in play, there’s plenty on the line in New Orleans.

Sometimes there’s just too much to keep up with, so these are just the top 5 AI releases from the past week that you should know about:

videos.title: Are You Thinking… or Being Controlled?
videos.summary_source_text:
Are You Thinking… or Being Controlled? The quality of life is shaped by the quality of thoughts. When awareness is constantly pulled in different directions, it can feel like control has been lost. This is not by accident, modern life is designed to keep attention hooked and distracted. Practicing silence creates a way to step back, observe thoughts, and regain control instead of being driven by them.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

videos.title: Why Nuggets Still Are Confident, What Aaron Gordon & PWAT Status LOOKED Like & More Inisde Practice
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Nuggets Still Are Confident, What Aaron Gordon & PWAT Status LOOKED Like & More Inisde Practice The Denver Nuggets say there is still no panic as they head into a must-win Game 4 against the Minnesota Timberwolves, even with Aaron Gordon and Peyton Watson both ruled out and Denver trailing 2-1 in the first-round series. In this DNVR Nuggets practice report from Target Center, get the latest on Aaron Gordon’s injury status, Peyton Watson’s outlook, the team’s confidence level, and why Denver believes better screening, more physicality, and cleaner execution can swing the series. Nikola Jokić, Jamal Murray, Christian Braun, and David Adelman all remain central to the conversation as the Nuggets search for answers before Saturday night. Watch for full Nuggets playoff practice notes, injury updates, and key takeaways ahead of a pivotal Game 4 in Minnesota. Go inside Denver Nuggets practice with Brendan Vogt for the latest Denver Nuggets news.

0:54 - Team Mood

videos.title: What is the PROBLEM with the Colorado Avalanche Power Play!? | Film Room
videos.summary_source_text:
What is the PROBLEM with the Colorado Avalanche Power Play!? | Film Room The Colorado Avalanche are one win away from a sweep of the Los Angeles Kings, but their power play remains a major concern heading into Game 4 after Colorado grabbed a 3-0 first-round series lead on April 23. In this Avalanche Film Room, we break down why Colorado’s power play has gone cold, from predictable half-court puck movement and perimeter play to missed shooting threats and a unit that is not creating enough high-danger chances. Using game tape from the Avs vs. Kings series, this video looks at the real problems with the Colorado Avalanche power play and what Colorado may need to adjust before the Stanley Cup Playoffs move deeper into Round 1.

videos.title: Eat a Sweet Potato — Watch What Happens to Your Gut, Blood, and Brain
videos.summary_source_text:
Eat a Sweet Potato — Watch What Happens to Your Gut, Blood, and Brain Most people eat sweet potatoes the same way, but one simple change can completely alter how your body responds to them. In this video, you’ll discover how cooling a cooked sweet potato transforms its starch structure through retrogradation, increasing resistant starch that feeds your gut microbiome instead of rapidly spiking your blood sugar. This powerful shift helps produce beneficial short-chain fatty acids like butyrate, strengthening your gut lining, reducing inflammation, and improving overall digestive health. You’ll also learn how this impacts your blood by stabilizing glucose and insulin levels, supporting better circulation, steady energy, and fewer cravings. Even more important, this process directly influences your brain through the gut-brain axis, helping improve focus, mood, and mental clarity. I’ll break down the key timing, how much to use, and simple ways to pair it with protein and healthy fats to maximize the benefit. This is about working with your physiology, not against it, so you can naturally support your gut, blood sugar, and brain health with one simple, powerful habit.

videos.title: GETTIN' STANKY WITH IT! Carolina Hurricanes Take 3-0 Series Lead After 2-1 Win
videos.summary_source_text:
GETTIN' STANKY WITH IT! Carolina Hurricanes Take 3-0 Series Lead After 2-1 Win The Carolina Hurricanes take a 3-0 series lead after defeating the Ottawa Senators 2-1 on Thursday night. The second line stood out again, and Frederik Andersen was a brick wall. What else stood out from the win to take a stranglehold on the series? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the story by sharing his thoughts on the second line continuing to be the best line not only in the series, but the playoffs as a whole. Logan Stnakoven scores, AGAIN. Taylor Hall with two assists and Jackson Blake scores his first of the series. They have a combined 13 points through three games. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on Frederik Andersen once again being a brick wall, giving up one goal again with a .955 save percentage. How has he been one of the reasons for the Hurricanes' success so far? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on the Hurricanes so far this series, with them going into a do-or-die game on Saturday. They're one win away from a sweep. Can they get it done? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

Panic Mode for 3 Teams: Penguins, Senators & Kings on the Brink | DFO Rundown The NHL Playoffs are delivering absolute chaos—and some teams are already on life support.

In this episode, we break down the series that look all but over, including Ottawa, LA, and Pittsburgh staring down 0-3 deficits. Is there ANY chance of a comeback, or is it already “good night”?

We dive into:

-Carolina completely shutting down Ottawa’s offense
-Colorado overpowering the Kings despite close games
-Why Philadelphia might be the most dangerous team right now
-Goalie decisions that could change entire series
-Early picks for playoff MVP

Plus, we preview Montreal vs Tampa in what’s becoming one of the most intense matchups of the postseason as Utah hosts their first ever Playoff home game.

videos.title: 🔥 Yeast-free and sugar-free! Healthy white seeded bread in 5 minutes (+ baking)
videos.summary_source_text:
🔥 Yeast-free and sugar-free! Healthy white seeded bread in 5 minutes (+ baking) 🔥 Yeast-free and sugar-free! Healthy white seeded bread in 5 minutes (plus baking). Delicious, quick, and easy. I highly recommend it!

1 cup (240 ml) cream.
1 tsp baking soda.
1/2 cup (120 ml) yogurt.
7 oz (200 g) cottage cheese.
1 egg.
Salt.
3½ cups (350 g) all-purpose flour.
1/3 cup (50 g) sunflower seeds. 1/3 cup (50 g) pumpkin seeds.
Olive oil.
Mix all ingredients. Let rest for 15 minutes.
Olive oil.
Bake the bread in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for about 60 minutes.

🌿 Thank you for watching my healthy recipes.
I’m truly happy to have you here on the channel.

1 cup (240 ml) cream.
1 tsp baking soda.
1/2 cup (120 ml) yogurt.
7 oz (200 g) cottage cheese.
1 egg.
Salt.
3½ cups (350 g) all-purpose flour.
1/3 cup (50 g) sunflower seeds. 1/3 cup (50 g) pumpkin seeds.
Olive oil.
Mix all ingredients. Let rest for 15 minutes.
Olive oil.
Bake the bread in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for about 60 minutes.

videos.title: ChatGPT 5.5 Is Here: I Tested What It Can Actually Do
videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT 5.5 Is Here: I Tested What It Can Actually Do *Get the ChatGPT guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/h30v

I walk through how I test ChatGPT 5.5 with real tasks like coding, dashboards, websites, and agentic work.

I wanted to see if ChatGPT 5.5 is really better than past ChatGPT models and other AI tools like Claude. So I gave it simple prompts, messy data, coding tests, and larger business tasks to see what it could do.

I test ChatGPT 5.5 on website design, HTML code, a Sim City style game, an Earth dashboard, a business dashboard, and an Apple style product page. I also try a bigger prompt where ChatGPT 5.5 has to make a landing page, slideshow, and financial dashboard from one idea.

I share what worked well, where ChatGPT 5.5 had errors, and how it compares to Claude Opus for coding and knowledge work. I also show how the thinking mode changes the results and why extended thinking can help with harder coding tasks.

This is my first look at ChatGPT 5.5, so I keep it simple and focus on real use cases. If you use ChatGPT for work, coding, research, data, dashboards, websites, or AI agents, this should help you see what ChatGPT 5.5 can actually do.

videos.title: UK | 24th April, Friday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 24th April, Friday - RIFT Presentation 24/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 24/04/26

 The Texas Rangers have a new rookie pitcher, but Peyton Gray isn’t a fresh-faced prospect. He’s a 30-year-old journeyman who never gave up the dream of pitching in the major leagues. videos.title: Sweep Watch, All Eyes on McDavid & Playoff Tensions Rising | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Sweep Watch, All Eyes on McDavid & Playoff Tensions Rising | Daily Faceoff Live The Carolina Hurricanes, Colorado Avalanche and Philadelphia Flyers are all on the verge of first-round sweeps, while pressure continues to mount across the rest of the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

We start in Carolina, where the Ottawa Senators delivered a flat performance and their power play failed to deliver in a critical moment. How concerning has Brady Tkachuk’s quiet start been, and should the league look at the  Taylor Hall hit on Jake Sanderson?

Out West, the Los Angeles Kings managed to limit Nathan MacKinnon, but it still wasn’t enough against the depth of the Colorado Avalanche. Is this simply a mismatch?

McDavid has zero points in two games but how long with this slump last? 

#oilers #Senators #Overtime #Hockey #NHL #Playoffs #StanleyCup #Highlights #Wild #Stars #Hurricanes #Flyers #Penguins #Bruins #Sabres #icehockey

We start in Carolina, where the Ottawa Senators delivered a flat performance and their power play failed to deliver in a critical moment. How concerning has Brady Tkachuk’s quiet start been, and should the league look at the  Taylor Hall hit on Jake Sanderson?

Out West, the Los Angeles Kings managed to limit Nathan MacKinnon, but it still wasn’t enough against the depth of the Colorado Avalanche. Is this simply a mismatch?

McDavid has zero points in two games but how long with this slump last?

First up, Justin Williams stops by to discuss the Carolina Hurricanes’ dominant 3-0 series lead over the Ottawa Senators, what’s clicking for Carolina, and whether there’s any path back for Ottawa.

Then, Ray Ferraro joins the show to break down the Buffalo Sabres bouncing back in a big way in Game 3 against the Boston Bruins, taking a 2-1 series lead and shifting the momentum in what’s turning into a tightly contested matchup.

videos.title: I can’t Believe They Let Me Play Here! (My Dream Golf Course)
videos.summary_source_text:
I can’t Believe They Let Me Play Here! (My Dream Golf Course) LONDON MARATHON DONATION LINK: https://www.justgiving.com/page/rick-shiels-marathon

Not many people in the world have ever been allowed to film at this place… and somehow, we did it.

Welcome to Leopard Creek Country Club — one of the most exclusive, breathtaking, and intimidating golf courses on the planet. Set right on the edge of the Kruger National Park, this is golf like you’ve never seen it before.

We’re talking wild animals roaming just metres away, insane views on every hole, and a golf course that demands your absolute best.

After playing Augusta National Golf Club, I didn’t think many places could come close… but this? This is right up there.

In this video, I take on Leopard Creek to see if I can handle the pressure, the conditions, and one of the most unique golfing environments in the world.

Expect:

* Jaw dropping scenery
* Risk and reward golf at its finest
* A course that punishes every mistake
* And a few surprises along the way…

If you love golf, travel, and bucket list experiences… this is one you don’t want to miss.

Let me know in the comments — is this the most beautiful course in the world?

Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions

• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

The Trick To Hitting Fairway Woods Off The Ground #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

How to hit driver straight and increase your driver distance: fix your weak right shots with 3 proven club face checkpoints — stop leaking distance and start hitting it pure.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available!

👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• How to hit driver straighter by understanding exactly why the ball leaks weak and right — and the one root cause most golfers never identify
• The "tilt it down" move that closes the club face at three critical positions in your driver swing, mirroring what PGATour pros actually do
• How an open club face silently converts your driver into a 5-wood — and how to reclaim your driver distance with a single swing adjustment
• Three progressive golf drills you can test one at a time to isolate your exact fault and fix it on the range today
• A simple alignment setup using a start line stick and pool noodle — the golf swing tip that ensures aim is never secretly costing you fairways
• How to check your grip so a weak hand position doesn't undo every other golf swing fix you make
• Golf swing analysis straight from Eric Cogorno showing exactly what Xander Schauffele, Patrick Cantlay, and Max Homa do at each checkpoint

If you're a high handicap golfer frustrated by a driver that leaks right and comes up short, this golf lesson gives you a clear, step-by-step system to fix it. Eric Cogorno breaks the problem down into three testable checkpoints — takeaway, last parallel, and follow-through — so you can identify exactly where your club face is going wrong and correct it one piece at a time. This is the same cause-and-effect golf swing analysis framework built into the Swing Coach AI app, which gives you instant audio feedback after every swing so your practice actually sticks. As your golf swing coach, Eric also covers two pre-swing setup keys — alignment and grip — so nothing in your how to play golf fundamentals is quietly working against you. Watch Eric's grip video linked at the end to complete the fix.

videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche @ Kings R1G3 Pregame LIVE | Guerilla Sports Jesse Montano and Meghan Angley are LIVE as the First Round series between the Colorado Avalanche and LA Kings shifts to Los Angeles with the Avs looking to take a stranglehold on the series, and the Kings looking for a jolt of life

The Avs took Game 1 behind goals from Artturi Lehkonen and Logan O'Connor, and an outstanding effort in net from Scott Wedgewood, and then it was Nic Roy in overtime of Game 2 to put the Avs up 2-0

Will the Avs take a 2-0 on the road? Or will the Kings steal one at Ball Arena and go home evened up?

videos.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra vs. iPhone 17 Pro Max Speed Test!
videos.summary_source_text:
Galaxy S26 Ultra vs. iPhone 17 Pro Max Speed Test! Anker Prime Power Bank (26K, 300W): https://ankerfast.club/9arnnw
Anker Prime Charger (160W, 3 Ports, Smart Display): https://ankerfast.club/xzo652 Sponsored by Anker.
Anker Amazon Brandstore: https://ankerfast.club/ex61v6
Anker Official Website: https://shop.anker.com/D29BUW

Speed test between the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra and Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max to see which phone is faster through our updated benchmark.

#AnkerPrime
#AnkerPrimePowerBank
#portablepowerbank
#AnkerPrimeCharger

TEST NOTES:
- Galaxy S26 Ultra temp started at 24.4 and ended at 33.9
- iPhone 17 Pro Max temp started at 22.4 and ended at 31.4
- Total Response Time Variance = 683 ms (in favor of iPhone)
- Total Double Swipe Variance = 3.81s (in favor of iPhone)
- There are intentional delays in Edge Gallery, Snapseed, and Files to equalize UI differences.
- Footage sped up by either 2x or 4x at indicated times for a better viewing experience.
- Devices are within an equal distance of a WiFi point.
- Websites are hosted locally, AI models are on-device.
- Screens were calibrated to 200 nits with auto brightness turned off.
- Tested in a temperature-controlled environment.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

📅 Zapier's Keep Up with AI webinar series: https://mrc.fm/keepup

I rebuilt my entire OpenClaw stack in a weekend using only Claude Code... VPS, Telegram, skills, memory, loops, reminders, the lot. videos.title: UK | 23rd April, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 23rd April, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 23/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 23/04/26

videos.title: Avalanche on the Doorstep of a Sweep Following Game 3 Win Over Kings
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche on the Doorstep of a Sweep Following Game 3 Win Over Kings Colorado Avalanche seize a commanding 3-0 series lead over the Los Angeles Kings, winning gritty instead of pretty. Can Cale Makar and Devon Toews’ breakout defensive performance carry Colorado to a sweep, even when the Avs aren’t playing their signature high-speed hockey?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Gabe Landeskog’s timely goal, a rare short-handed tally from Artturi Lehkonen, and Ross Colton’s energized return to the lineup. Hear sharp analysis of Scott Wedgewood’s clutch goaltending, Sam Malinski’s impact, and the implications of Josh Manson’s injury for the Avalanche blue line. Key topics include Colorado’s power play struggles, Los Angeles’ desperate tactical shift, and what the Avs’ resilient, grinding victories reveal about their Stanley Cup potential. Will Nathan MacKinnon and Martin Necas explode offensively in time for Round 2, or does Colorado need more from its top guns to close out the Kings?

videos.title: 10 impact transfers for CSU Football in 2026 + power ranking the Pac-12 basketball coaches & more
videos.summary_source_text:
10 impact transfers for CSU Football in 2026 + power ranking the Pac-12 basketball coaches & more Justin Michael begins the podcast by talking about 10 transfers that he expects to make a major impact for CSU Football in 2026. He talks about the quarterbacks and some of the other standouts from spring, including Juice Vereen, Mel Brown and Elijah Mc Cantos. Justin then talks about CSU men’s basketball officially signing Marist transfer guard Justin Menard and the options that Ali Farokhmanesh will have with his rotation. Finally, Justin talks about where CSU will stand in the Pac-12 hoops hierarchy going into the league before power ranking the coaches.

0:00 - Intro
3:25 - Final thoughts on CSU football spring sessions
9:30 - 10 transfer players that CSU needs to step up big for them this season.

videos.title: Jokic, Nuggets Dismantled by Timberwolves in Blowout Game 3 Loss | DNVR Nuggets Postgame Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Jokic, Nuggets Dismantled by Timberwolves in Blowout Game 3 Loss | DNVR Nuggets Postgame Live The Nuggets were just embarrassed. The team started things off by only scoring 11 points in the first quarter, and things never really got better after that. Jokic had one of the worst games of his career and through games Rudy Gobert has gotten the best of him in a way we’ve never seen. The Timberwolves now take a 2-1 lead in the series and it feels like the Nuggets are reeling and fighting for their lives. Can the Nuggets bounce back from here or is tonight a sign that the team has quit on the season? What the hell happened? Adam Mares, Harrison Wind, Duvalier Johnson, Miroslav Cuk, and Eric Wedum (D-Line Co.) come to you LIVE from the DNVR bar to break down everything you need to know in this playoff postgame edition of the DNVR Nuggets Podcast!

The Danish goalie's heroics earn him both 2nd star of the game and Top European Player of the Night honors!

videos.title: Hindi | 23rd April, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 23rd April, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 23/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 23/04/26

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | Zurich Classic of New Orleans | 2026 Check out all the best shots from the opening round of the 2026 Zurich Classic of New Orleans, featuring Brooks Koepka, Wyndham Clark, Shane Lowry and Matt Fitzpatrick, among others.

It’s once again time to team up at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans, the PGA TOUR’s only team event, held at TPC Louisiana. Now in its ninth year as a pairs format, the event mixes Four-ball and Foursomes across four days, delivering a unique test and plenty of volatility as duos battle for momentum and FedExCup points with the Cadillac Championship on the horizon. Fresh off his playoff win at the RBC Heritage, Matt Fitzpatrick teams up with brother Alex Fitzpatrick, forming one of the most in-form pairings in the field.  A major storyline sees Brooks Koepka return to the event alongside past champion Shane Lowry who won in 2024 with back-to-back Masters champion Rory McIlroy, while defending champions Ben Griffin and Andrew Novak look to make history as the first team to go back-to-back. Rising stars are also well represented, with Michael Brennan and Johnny Keefer making their debuts, while Blades Brown pairs with Luke Clanton as part of the next wave of talent. International pairings add further intrigue, including Tom Kim with Kevin Yu, and the South African duo of Erik van Rooyen and Christiaan Bezuidenhout. With no other event like it on TOUR, the Zurich Classic blends chemistry, strategy and shot making and with major qualification pathways and Signature Event spots in play, there’s plenty on the line in New Orleans.

videos.title: GM Search Heats Up | Leafs, Canucks & Predators Facing Huge Decisions w/ David Pagnotta
videos.summary_source_text:
GM Search Heats Up | Leafs, Canucks & Predators Facing Huge Decisions w/ David Pagnotta The GM search continues around the NHL as the Toronto Maple Leafs, Vancouver Canucks, and Nashville Predators work to fill some of the league’s most important front office roles.

With pressure mounting in Toronto, questions about direction in Vancouver, and Nashville weighing it's next move, these hires could shape the future of all three franchises for years to come. Who are the leading candidates, and what kind of direction will each team choose?

We break down the latest rumors, potential fits, and what each team truly needs in its next general manager.

Will these teams go with experience, analytics-driven minds, or surprise everyone with bold hires? The decisions ahead could define the next era for all three organizations.

videos.title: This Is Why You Struggle With Shooting Shoulder Sling Edition
videos.summary_source_text:
This Is Why You Struggle With Shooting Shoulder Sling Edition The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Jonny Lazarus on Why These NHL Playoffs Feel Different | The Sheet
videos.summary_source_text:
Jonny Lazarus on Why These NHL Playoffs Feel Different | The Sheet Jeff Marek is joined by Greg Wyshynski and Jonny Lazarus for a loaded playoff breakdown on The Sheet as the first round of the Stanley Cup Playoffs continues to deliver chaos, intensity, and unexpected storylines. The trio dives into the electric Dallas Stars vs. Minnesota Wild series, debates embellishment vs. drawing penalties, and explores why playoff hockey has become more physical than ever. Lazarus brings insight on surprising performances across the league, including the Buffalo Sabres’ struggles, Edmonton’s stars being held quiet, and Utah pushing Vegas harder than expected. They also get into coaching impact, power play struggles, and whether discipline is becoming the defining factor in winning series. Plus, a fun (and chaotic) debate on potential NHL rule changes — from penalty shot options to overtime formats — and Lazarus explains his viral tattoo bets.

Subscribe for more daily NHL coverage, playoff breakdowns, and insider analysis right here on The Sheet.

#NHL #StanleyCupPlayoffs #TheSheet #JeffMarek #GregWyshynski #JonnyLazarus #Hockey #NHLPlayoffs #DallasStars #MinnesotaWild #VegasGoldenKnights #BuffaloSabres

videos.title: Episode 43: Devils Post-Mortem | Tri-State Hockey Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Episode 43: Devils Post-Mortem | Tri-State Hockey Podcast Episode 43 of the Tri-State Hockey Podcast is here as Jonny Lazarus, Arthur Staple, and Mike Rupp dive into a full New Jersey Devils season postmortem and what comes next for the franchise. The guys break down the early Stanley Cup Playoff storylines, including the dominance of the Philadelphia Flyers and what it reveals about structure, defense, and rush chances. They then shift focus to the Devils, reacting to Sunny Mehta’s introductory press conference, his analytics-plus-intuition philosophy, and what it means for the organization moving forward. From coaching uncertainty around Sheldon Keefe to roster decisions, defensive concerns, and fan expectations, this episode covers every angle of a pivotal offseason in New Jersey.

videos.title: The Screenless OpenAI Device That Could Replace Your Phone | Sam Altman
videos.summary_source_text:
The Screenless OpenAI Device That Could Replace Your Phone | Sam Altman Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Jony Ive and Sam Altman are building an AI device together — and the leaks suggest it's unlike anything we've seen before. No screen. No buttons. Just voice. But will it actually work, or is this another Humane AI Pin disaster in the making?

In this video, I break down EVERYTHING we know about OpenAI's upcoming AI companion device based on credible leaks, interviews, and analyst reports.

🔍 WHAT YOU'LL LEARN:
01:06 – What Is This Thing?
02:53 – Why Is OpenAI Building Hardware?
04:26 – How Could This Change Your Life?
05:51 – When Is It Coming?
07:05 – The Big Challenges
08:44 – The Bottom Line

💡 KEY TAKEAWAYS:
- The device is palm-sized, screenless, and voice-first
- Designed to work ALONGSIDE your phone, not replace it
- Altman says it could add $1 TRILLION in value to OpenAI
- Expected launch: late 2026 to early 2027
- Major privacy, hardware, and competition risks ahead

🤔 DISCUSSION:
Would you actually carry an always-on AI companion? Or is this a privacy nightmare waiting to happen? Drop your thoughts in the comments — I read every single one!

👍 If this video helped you understand what's coming, smash that LIKE button and SUBSCRIBE for more deep dives into AI, tech, and the future of computing.

🔔 Turn on notifications so you don't miss the next one!

videos.title: Drink This Once — See What Happens to Your Circulation
videos.summary_source_text:
Drink This Once — See What Happens to Your Circulation Drink this once and see how your body responds, because your circulation is not just about your heart pumping blood, it’s about how well your blood vessels open and adapt, and most people never support that process at all, this simple beet-based drink helps your body produce nitric oxide, which is the key signal that allows blood vessels to relax and improve blood flow, even a small daily amount like four to six ounces of beet juice or one teaspoon of beet powder mixed in water can begin supporting this pathway, and if you want to take it further, adding lemon helps protect nitric oxide while pomegranate provides powerful polyphenols that support the endothelial lining of your vessels, the key is consistency and simplicity, you do not need everything to get started, just begin with one level and let your body respond, over time better circulation can support oxygen delivery, vascular function, and overall efficiency inside the body, try it once, observe how you feel, and build from there.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: You Might Be Using the Wrong Release for Your Swing — And Not Know It
videos.summary_source_text:
You Might Be Using the Wrong Release for Your Swing — And Not Know It Stop wasting time working on the wrong things.  Take our free 7-question Game Assessment and discover the #1 thing you need to work on to improve your game.  👉 https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=23.04.26

Most golfers are told to “release the club”…but very few actually understand what that means - or which release is right for them.

In this video, we break down why so many golfers learn the wrong release, and how that leads to inconsistent ball striking, poor face control, and those frustrating left and right misses.

You’ll learn:
- What the release actually is and why it matters
- How your grip style and club face influence your release
- Why there isn’t one “correct” way to release the club
- How grip size and condition can also affect how the club releases

If you’ve ever felt like you’re timing your swing or struggling to control your ball flight, this will help you understand what’s really going on and what to focus on instead.

videos.summary_source_text:
This Optical Illusion Is RUINING Your Golf Swing (You Don’t Even See It) This optical illusion is ruining your golf swing… and you don’t even know it.

If you struggle with alignment, slicing, inconsistent ball striking, or aiming issues, this could be the hidden reason why. In this video, we reveal the common visual mistake that affects how golfers aim and set up to the ball. What you think you see isn’t always reality—and that illusion can quietly destroy your swing path, face angle, and consistency

Claude 5 Explained: 1M Tokens, $5 API & 27-Year-Old Bug Cracked Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone's talking about Claude 5 — but Anthropic hasn't actually released it. 
So what's really going on? I spent weeks digging through Anthropic's docs, leaked 
internal slides, and benchmark data to separate what's confirmed from pure 
speculation. Here's the full breakdown of Claude 5, every submodel (Haiku, 
Sonnet, Opus), the mysterious Mythos Preview, and whether Dario Amodei's 
bold AGI predictions actually hold up.

🔑 WHAT YOU'LL LEARN:
✅ Why "Claude 5" doesn't exist yet — and what Anthropic ACTUALLY shipped
✅ Claude Opus 4.7 vs 4.6 vs Sonnet 4.6 vs Haiku 4.5 — the real differences
✅ Project Glasswing & Claude Mythos — the model Anthropic WON'T release
✅ The 27-year-old OpenBSD bug Mythos cracked autonomously
✅ Claude vs GPT-5.2 vs Gemini 3 vs Llama 3 — honest comparison
✅ The 1M token context window explained (and why it matters)
✅ Dario Amodei's "90% confidence in AGI" claim — hype or reality?
✅ Which Claude model YOU should actually use in 2026

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS:
00:00 The Claude 5 mystery
01:15 What Anthropic has actually released

💬 Drop a comment: What model are you using, and what would Claude 5 need 
to offer for you to switch?

pages, TechCrunch, Axios, CNBC, Stanford HAI predictions.

videos.title: Last time Sabres and Bruins met in the playoffs - way back to 2010 #stanleycupplayoffs
videos.summary_source_text:
Last time Sabres and Bruins met in the playoffs - way back to 2010 #stanleycupplayoffs In 2010, just as in 2026, the Sabres and Bruins met in the first round and the underdog Bruins split the first two games in Buffalo. Here in game 6, the Bruins had a chance to win the series at home and David Krejci played a big part in Boston's clinching victory. The Stanley Cup Playoffs continue with the Final set for early June.

videos.title: These 3 Drills Can Put a Golf Coach Out of Business
videos.summary_source_text:
These 3 Drills Can Put a Golf Coach Out of Business Try our "No More Slices" Program to Hit The Straightest Drives of Your Life:
https://www.golfsenseitraining.com/slice?el=youtube

Flashlight Golf Trainer video: https://youtu.be/0wxqT8jdJng

*We earn a commission from affiliate links. These support the channel and help us create better videos!

If you only did these 3 golf drills, your swing would improve faster than you ever thought possible. After 30+ years of teaching, Coach Ed Schwent shares the exact drills he uses with students every day to fix slices, improve swing path, and create more consistent ball striking.

You’ll learn how to use alignment sticks to train the correct downswing path, a powerful angled stick drill that forces you to swing on plane (and eliminate over-the-top moves), and the famous flashlight drill that teaches you exactly where your club shaft should point throughout the swing. These drills are simple, can be done at home or the range, and give instant feedback so you know if you’re doing it right.

If you struggle with slicing, inconsistent contact, or poor swing plane, these drills will help you build a repeatable, fundamentally sound golf swing. Master them, and you’ll start hitting straighter, more powerful shots in no time.

You’ve probably been told to avoid foods like butter, cheese, and other saturated fats. But these foods contain essential nutrients like vitamin K2 and vitamin A, which actually help support your arteries by moving calcium OUT of them.

Meanwhile, foods heavily promoted as healthy, like seed oils and processed cereals, may be doing the exact opposite.

videos.title: The #1 Remedy to Remove Blackheads Permanently
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Remedy to Remove Blackheads Permanently What causes blackheads and clogged pores? Find out how to remove blackheads permanently with the #1 blackhead remedy that addresses the root cause of your skin issues. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: What causes blackheads?
2:14 Most common blackhead cause 
2:51 Vitamin A and blackheads 
5:48 The best blackhead remedy
 
Keep watching for skin tips, easy ways to identify hormonal imbalances, and more:
▶️ https://youtu.be/XwSSkrItr0c
▶️ https://youtu.be/LFWspXbN8jY
▶️ https://youtu.be/Hx5vxhx6fsU

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4u57wLp

What causes blackheads? Every blackhead on your face is caused by a specific type of fat called palmitic acid, not bacteria and not dirt. Your body makes palmitic acid out of sugar, so when you consume too much, your body converts the excess into palmitic acid.

Zinc deficiency is one of the most common blackhead causes. Vitamin A is also vital for blackhead removal because it controls oil production on the skin. Vitamin A does not work without zinc. 

To remove blackheads and keep them from returning, you must eliminate excess sugar from your diet. Follow a ketogenic diet, practice intermittent fasting, and consume nutrient-dense foods. Consume liver or shellfish for zinc, and cod liver oil to boost vitamin A.

videos.summary_source_text:
No Tops + No Fats! The Trick To Hitting Fairway Woods Off The Ground Fairway woods off the ground — master the ONE move that fixes tops, thins, and fat shots with your fairway wood: extended arms through impact with weight forward.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available!

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com 

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com 

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com

• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

⏰ TIMESTAMPS: 
🏌️ 0:00 Eric Cogorno's One Move Every Fairway Wood Swing Needs 
⚡ 0:36 Why You Top and Thin Your Fairway Woods (The Real Cause) 
💥 1:35 Why Fat Shots Happen — Hips Too Far Back 
🎯 2:02 Perfect 3-Wood Setup: Ball Position, Stance Width & Shaft Angle 
💪 2:55 Level One Drill: Half Swing to Build Extension and Weight Forward 
🔥 5:02 How Your Angle of Attack Should Differ From Irons and Driver 
✅ 7:30 Progressions: Half Swing to Full Swing Step-by-Step 
⛳ 8:22 Bag Drill: How to Train Full Extension at Home 
🏆 9:49 Direction Control — Fixing Your Fade, Hook, Pull, and Push 
🚀 12:58 Putting It All Together: Solid Contact Down the Middle

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• Master the single most important position through the ball for consistent fairway wood contact — club head and arms fully extended away from your body
• Eliminate topped and thinned shots by learning why bent arms and wrists pull the club up at impact
• Fix fat shots for good by understanding how to shift your hips and weight forward through the ball instead of hanging back
• Build the correct golf swing feel for your 3-wood using a simple half-swing drill any high handicap golfer can execute immediately
• Use the Bag Drill — a training aid you already own — to physically train the extension position at home
• Apply golf swing tips for correcting your specific ball flight: fade, hook, pull, or push — all with the same foundational move
• Understand the ideal angle of attack for a fairway wood — not an iron swing, not a driver swing, but right in between

Eric Cogorno breaks down one of the most misunderstood parts of the golf swing — what your club, arms, and hips should be doing through the impact zone with a fairway wood. Rather than relying on vague swing feels, this lesson gives you a drill progression you can apply immediately on the range or even at home. Eric's coaching style connects directly to the ball-flight problems most amateur golfers experience, making this golf swing analysis you can actually use. If you want to take this further, work with Eric through personalized online coaching at https://www.cogornogolf.comor download the Swing Coach AI app for guided practice. For more on improving your long game, check out Eric's related videos on ball striking and iron play.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: Are expensive off-roaders POINTLESS?
videos.summary_source_text:
Are expensive off-roaders POINTLESS? Huge thanks the owners of the 4x4s used in this off-road battle!

Land Rover Defender OCTA - https://www.instagram.com/thecarfilmingsafetyguy/
Ineos Grenadier - https://www.instagram.com/buzz_special_vehicles/
...tuned by - https://www.instagram.com/tomwrigleyperformance/
... and driven by - https://www.instagram.com/alexparpottas/
Ford Ranger Raptor - https://www.instagram.com/rhino_metalworkz/

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-2304

It’s time for some of the toughest off-roaders to go head-to-head! 

We’ve got our hands on the Land Rover Defender OCTA, a tuned Ineos Grenadier, and a tuned Ford Ranger Raptor, and they’re going to go head-to-head over a series of off-road challenges to see which is the best when you head off the tarmac.

But how do they compare on paper? Let’s deep dive into the stats… 

The Land Rover Defender OCTA is powered by a BMW 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 that produces 635hp and 750Nm. Power is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed auto gearbox, and the car weighs in at 2,510kg. It has several features to help it traverse this off-road course, including a central & rear locking diffs as well as uprated suspension. However, it’s not cheap - it costs an eye-watering £158,000! 

Up next, we have the tuned Grenadier. It rolls up with a tuned 3-litre straight-six that puts down 450hp and 680Nm. It’s slightly lighter than the OCTA, at 2,480kg. It’s also equipped with a central locking diff, uprated suspension, and it’s a whole lot cheaper than the Land Rover, costing around £100,000. 

Then, finally, we have the tuned Ford Ranger Raptor. It’s powered by a 3-litre twin-turbo V6, and this sends 420hp and 610Nm to all four wheels via a 10-speed auto gearbox. It’s packing a front and rear diff, lifted suspension, and aftermarket wheels and tyres - the only car here not on factory tyres! It tips the scales at 2,454kg, and it’s by far the cheapest car here, costing around £60,000. 

So the Ineos and Ford combined cost the same as the OCTA. But will either of them be able to take down this top-of-the-range Defender? There’s only one way to find out! Huge thanks the owners of the 4x4s used in this off-road battle!

videos.title: Best Nutrients to Remove Plaque from Arteries
videos.summary_source_text:
Best Nutrients to Remove Plaque from Arteries Did you know that arterial plaque reversal can occur naturally? Find out how to unclog arteries with 5 key nutrients! 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Life Extension (Mega K2):
https://www.lifeextension.com/vitamins-supplements/item02417/mega-vitamin-k2-high-potency-for-strong-bones 

DATA: 
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5644504/ 
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7238900/  

0:00 Introduction: Clogged arteries  
0:20 Soft plaque vs. hard plaque 
1:08 The CAC paradox
2:13 LDL, HDL, and triglycerides 
4:08 How to determine which type of LDL you have 
4:49 Which nutrients clean your arteries naturally? 
7:17 Check out my video about the best meal to clean out your arteries!

In this video, I'm going to share what you can do to help remove plaque from your arteries naturally. Plaque is made of cholesterol, calcium, and protein. These 3 ingredients form a band-aid if you have inflammation or other issues on the inside of your artery.

There are 2 types of plaque: soft plaque (unstable, dangerous) and hard plaque (calcified, stable, less dangerous). Soft plaque is 4 times as common as calcified plaque! 

A CAC test gives you a score of how much plaque you have in your arteries. This test primarily detects calcified plaque, so the score usually won’t reflect soft plaque.

The CAC paradox is a phenomenon that occurs after you clean up your diet and get healthy, but your CAC score rises. This doesn't mean your plaque is getting worse. It means that some of your soft plaque has stabilized and become hard plaque. 

Soft plaque is associated with glycation and more oxidation of the LDL. There are 2 types of LDL: small-dense pathogenic LDL and large-buoyant non-pathogenic LDL. 

Myeloperoxidase and Lp-PLA2 both signify soft plaque on a blood test. An ultrasound can also detect soft plaque.  

Higher HDL can help clean up pathogenic bad LDL. You also want to keep your triglycerides low. High triglycerides can signify that your diet is too high in carbs. You may want to request to test your lipoprotein insulin resistance. This factor is associated with cardiovascular atherosclerosis more than any other.

Here’s how to determine whether you have small dense LDL or large buoyant LDL. Divide the LDL by ApoB—the part of the lipoprotein that indicates the number of particles. You want your result to be greater than 1.2. This indicates large buoyant LDL. 

The following nutrients may help remove arterial plaque buildup naturally:
1. Pycnogenol–150 mg  
2. Gotu Kola–450 mg 
3. Vitamin K2–Life Extension Mega K2 
4. Nattokinase 
5. Niacin

Vitamin K2 is the most potent inhibitor of vascular calcification. Tocotrienols, berberine, aged garlic, magnesium, potassium, and vitamin D also help to clean out plaque naturally.   

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 58, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book "The Healthy Keto Plan" and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

In this video, I'm going to share what you can do to help remove plaque from your arteries naturally. Plaque is made of cholesterol, calcium, and protein. These 3 ingredients form a band-aid if you have inflammation or other issues on the inside of your artery.

There are 2 types of plaque: soft plaque (unstable, dangerous) and hard plaque (calcified, stable, less dangerous). Soft plaque is 4 times as common as calcified plaque! 

A CAC test gives you a score of how much plaque you have in your arteries. This test primarily detects calcified plaque, so the score usually won’t reflect soft plaque.

The CAC paradox is a phenomenon that occurs after you clean up your diet and get healthy, but your CAC score rises. This doesn't mean your plaque is getting worse. It means that some of your soft plaque has stabilized and become hard plaque. 

Soft plaque is associated with glycation and more oxidation of the LDL. There are 2 types of LDL: small-dense pathogenic LDL and large-buoyant non-pathogenic LDL. 

Myeloperoxidase and Lp-PLA2 both signify soft plaque on a blood test. An ultrasound can also detect soft plaque.  

Higher HDL can help clean up pathogenic bad LDL. You also want to keep your triglycerides low. High triglycerides can signify that your diet is too high in carbs. You may want to request to test your lipoprotein insulin resistance. This factor is associated with cardiovascular atherosclerosis more than any other.

Here’s how to determine whether you have small dense LDL or large buoyant LDL. Divide the LDL by ApoB—the part of the lipoprotein that indicates the number of particles. You want your result to be greater than 1.2. This indicates large buoyant LDL. 

The following nutrients may help remove arterial plaque buildup naturally:
1. Pycnogenol–150 mg  
2. Gotu Kola–450 mg 
3. Vitamin K2–Life Extension Mega K2 
4. Nattokinase 
5. Niacin

Vitamin K2 is the most potent inhibitor of vascular calcification. Tocotrienols, berberine, aged garlic, magnesium, potassium, and vitamin D also help to clean out plaque naturally.

videos.summary_source_text:
THURSDAY GAMEDAY! 3 Storylines Heading into Game 3 for the Carolina Hurricanes The Carolina Hurricanes are up 2-0 in the series, and are looking to take a 3-0 stranglehold on the series. That said, what are the three storylines heading into Game 3 against the Ottawa Senators? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the story by giving his first storyline heading into Game 3, which features Frederik Andersen. After giving up two goals through the first two games, can Andersen keep his current run of form going? His 0.78 GAA and .967 SV% have been huge for the Hurricanes, and they will be looking for him to stay red hot in the crease. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how the Hurricanes will need to stick to their structure and fend off the Senators' push at home in Game 3. With them being down 2-0 already and not wanting to go down 3-0, the Senators will be aggressive. The Hurricanes will need to fend that off and counter them with their system. Lastly, Zach concludes the show by looking at the big players stepping up in Game 3. While the second line has been producing, along with Sebastian Aho and Jordan Martinook getting on the xcoresheet, the Hurricanes will need the top guys to get rolling and really put pressure on the Senators. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 463. Pension för företagare | Med Monica Sjödin
videos.summary_source_text:
463. Pension för företagare | Med Monica Sjödin Skillnaden mellan att pensionsplanera rätt och fel som företagare handlar inte om tusenlappar, det kan handla om hundratusentals kronor. Ändå är det de flesta skjuter på framtiden. I det här avsnittet bjuder vi in pensionsexperten Monica Sjödin, som själv driver företag och har börjat ta ut pension, för att du ska få de viktigaste tipsen, misstagen att undvika och vad man behöver planera i förväg.

För tydlighetens skull: vi har INTE fåt betalt för avsnittet, men vi gör reklam för Monicas kurs “pensionsspara smart för företagare” som startar 6 maj.

TL;DR: Pension för företagare handlar egentligen inte om pension – det handlar om att ta ut kapital ur bolaget så skatteeffektivt som möjligt. Du fördelar mellan lön, utdelning via K10 och sparande via kapitalförsäkring eller aktiedepå. Periodiseringsfonder parkerar obeskattad vinst i upp till sex år och tas ut som lön när skatten är lägre. Börja planera ca fem till tio år i förväg. Perfekt när man vill gå i pension tidigare.

Detta avsnittet är det första av fyra som vi gjorde tillsammans med @Monica om pension för 2026. Idag handlar det om pension för företagare och de andra som kommer inom kort handlar om löneväxling, pension för mig som anställd och uttagssplanering. Huvudpoängen i detta första avsnitt är:

Som företagare tänk utifrån frågan: “Hur tar jag ut kapital från bolaget på smartaste sätt?” snarare än tänka pension.

Normalt sett brukar jag alltid driva poängen att ordningen är:

Lön upp till den statliga brytgränsen + tjänstepension med försäkringar motsvarande anställd
Maximal utdelning enligt K10 eftersom man inte vill ha mer pengar i bolaget än nödvändigt
Eventuell extra avsättning för pension via något av pensionsalternativen
Investering av företagets överskottslikviditet

Det roliga är att jag och Monica är knappt överens om den första punkten. 😂 Några av de andra sakerna vi tar upp:

▸  Periodiseringsfonder är ett pensionsverktyg de flesta missar
▸  Vid 68 sjunker arbetsgivaravgiften till 10,21 % – och det förändrar hela kalkylen
▸  Aktiedepå i bolaget kan slå kapitalförsäkring – beroende på hur du tar ut
▸  60 % av alla företagare tar ut under 46 000 kr/mån i lön – och 20 % tar ut noll
▸  Tjänstepension nära pension kan vara ett misstag
▸  Att maxa tjänstepension tidigt i livet kan ge enorm utväxling
▸  Direktpension skyddar mot omvärlden – men inte mot dig själv
▸  Holdingbolag blev “årets julklapp” – och det är inte överdrivet

Jag vill även puffa för följande två trådar i forumet som dyker ner ännu djupare i jämförelser mellan kapitalförsäkring, direktpension, aktie- och fonddepå och de olika kombinationerna:

▸ Sammanfattning av ovanstående: https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t/24710/
▸  Sammanfattning i olika faser i ens företagande: https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t//24710/51

Vi hoppas att du även gillar det nya angreppsättet som vi provade med att Caroline ställde frågorna. 🙂

Hälsningar,
Jan, Caroline och Monica

Länkar:
====

▸  Läs mer på hennes hemsida via vår sponsrade länk: https://rikatillsammans.se/partner/pensionsguiden
▸  Följ diskussionen i forumet: https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t/121263

====
